utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified as required: (1) health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan provides physical_health and mental_health with plan names and monthly costs—fully specified. (2) property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan includes home_contents with a plan and monthly cost—fully specified. (3) travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. The plan includes travel_accident with plan and cost. While it narrows to accident, it still provides a travel insurance component with costs—acceptable for the format requirement. (4) additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan includes technology_protection add-on with cost—fully specified. (5) total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan gives a monthly total (€315/month) but no annual breakdown. Since the format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown, the annual component is missing. Therefore, 4 items are fully specified; total_budget is partially specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final plan includes: InsurePlus Standard Plan for physical health, InsurePlus Standard Plan for mental health, InsurePlus Standard Coverage for home contents, InsurePlus Standard Plan for travel accident (travel insurance), and Technology Protection Add-on. From the ground-truth: Physical health InsurePlus Standard Plan has rating 10. Mental health InsurePlus Standard Plan has rating 7. Home content InsurePlus Standard Coverage has rating 10. Travel insurance InsurePlus Standard Plan has rating 10. Property enhancement Technology Protection has rating 8.
